en.extract:
The bronze-tailed starling or bronze-tailed glossy-starling (Lamprotornis chalcurus) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is native to the Sudan and adjacent areas.

The '''bronze-tailed starling''' or '''bronze-tailed glossy-starling''' ('''''Lamprotornis chalcurus''''') is a species of [[starling]] in the family [[Sturnidae]]. It is native to the [[Sudan (region)|Sudan]] and adjacent areas.
